name: DateTimePicker
description: Combined date + time picker with timezone awareness.

api.name: DateTimePicker
api.description: Combined date + time picker with timezone awareness.

parameters.name: Required
parameters.description: Marks the field required, rendering a trailing asterisk on Label and setting aria-required on the trigger button.

parameters.name: Invalid
parameters.description: Forces the invalid (error) visual state — a destructive border/ring — even when not inside a FormField reporting an error. ORed with the ambient FormField error state.

parameters.name: ErrorText
parameters.description: Error message shown below the field when invalid. Only rendered when this picker is standalone (outside a FormField, which owns its own error slot).

parameters.name: HelperText
parameters.description: Helper text shown below the field when not invalid. Only rendered when this picker is standalone (outside a FormField).

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Field label rendered above the trigger button. Suppressed when nested inside a FormField, which renders its own label.

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: The trigger button's name attribute, for form submission/identification.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The selected local date and time. Two-way bindable via ValueChanged; also derivable from/to OffsetValue when a TimeZone is configured.

parameters.name: ValueChanged
parameters.description: Raised when the user picks a date or time (or clears via Clearable) with the new Value.

parameters.name: OffsetValue
parameters.description: Optional DateTimeOffset binding. When the caller binds this, it takes precedence: writes flow back through OffsetValueChanged with the offset that matches TimeZone at the picked wall-clock time (DST-aware). The plain ValueChanged still fires for back-compat. Recommended over Value when working with multi-zone scenarios.

parameters.name: OffsetValueChanged
parameters.description: Raised alongside ValueChanged with the offset-aware instant (DST-adjusted for TimeZone) whenever the picked value changes.

parameters.name: TimeZone
parameters.description: When non-null, all display/edit happens in this zone — the user picks a wall-clock instant in that zone, and the emitted DateTimeOffset carries the matching offset for that instant (DST-aware). When null, the picker behaves exactly as before (local time, no zone indicator).

parameters.name: ShowTimeZoneLabel
parameters.description: When true (default) and TimeZone is set, renders a small "Europe/Berlin (UTC+1)"-style indicator next to the value.

parameters.name: Use24Hour
parameters.description: Shows 24-hour time (00-23) instead of a 12-hour clock with an AM/PM column. Default true.

parameters.name: ShowSeconds
parameters.description: Adds a seconds column to the time picker. Default false (minute precision).

parameters.name: MinuteStep
parameters.description: Minute column increment. 1 (default) lists every minute; 5/15 etc. list only multiples of the step.

parameters.name: SecondStep
parameters.description: Second column increment (only relevant when ShowSeconds is true). Defaults to 1.

parameters.name: DateFormat
parameters.description: Date portion format. When null (default) falls back to the effective culture's ShortDatePattern.

parameters.name: Placeholder
parameters.description: Placeholder shown on the trigger button when no value is selected. Falls back to the localized "DateTimePicker.Placeholder" string when null.

parameters.name: Culture
parameters.description: Overrides CurrentCulture for date/time formatting. Leave null to honour ASP.NET request localization.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: Disables the trigger button, preventing the popover from opening.

parameters.name: Clearable
parameters.description: Shows a trailing clear (X) button on the trigger when a value is selected, letting the user reset Value to null.

parameters.name: MinDate
parameters.description: Earliest selectable date/time. Forwarded to the embedded calendar's date gate; on the boundary day, also disables times before MinDate's time-of-day.

parameters.name: MaxDate
parameters.description: Latest selectable date/time. Forwarded to the embedded calendar's date gate; on the boundary day, also disables times after MaxDate's time-of-day.

parameters.name: IsDateDisabled
parameters.description: Per-date predicate returning true to disable a specific date in the embedded calendar, independent of MinDate/MaxDate.

parameters.name: FirstDayOfWeek
parameters.description: Override the locale-derived first day of week shown by the embedded calendar. Forwarded to the inner Calendar; leave null to fall back to CurrentCulture.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the trigger button.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the trigger button.

events.name: ValueChanged
events.description: Raised when the user picks a date or time (or clears via Clearable) with the new Value.

events.name: OffsetValueChanged
events.description: Raised alongside ValueChanged with the offset-aware instant (DST-adjusted for TimeZone) whenever the picked value changes.

examples.title: Min & Max Date
examples.code:
<DateTimePicker @bind-Value="_dateTime" MinDate="@_minDate" MaxDate="@_maxDate" Placeholder="Select within range" />

@code {
    private DateTime? _dateTime;
    private DateTime _minDate = DateTime.Today;
    private DateTime _maxDate = DateTime.Today.AddDays(30);
}

mdSummary:
# DateTimePicker

Combined date + time picker with timezone awareness.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms/Specialized
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/date-time-picker

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| DateTimePicker | FormField | `FormField.FormFieldContext?` | `` |  |
| DateTimePicker | Required | `bool` | `` | Marks the field required, rendering a trailing asterisk on Label and setting aria-required on the trigger button. |
| DateTimePicker | Invalid | `bool` | `` | Forces the invalid (error) visual state — a destructive border/ring — even when not inside a FormField reporting an error. ORed with the ambient FormField error state. |
| DateTimePicker | ErrorText | `string?` | `` | Error message shown below the field when invalid. Only rendered when this picker is standalone (outside a FormField, which owns its own error slot). |
| DateTimePicker | HelperText | `string?` | `` | Helper text shown below the field when not invalid. Only rendered when this picker is standalone (outside a FormField). |
| DateTimePicker | Label | `string?` | `` | Field label rendered above the trigger button. Suppressed when nested inside a FormField, which renders its own label. |
| DateTimePicker | Name | `string?` | `` | The trigger button's name attribute, for form submission/identification. |
| DateTimePicker | Value | `DateTime?` | `` | The selected local date and time. Two-way bindable via ValueChanged; also derivable from/to OffsetValue when a TimeZone is configured. |
| DateTimePicker | ValueChanged | `EventCallback<DateTime?>` | `` | Raised when the user picks a date or time (or clears via Clearable) with the new Value. |
| DateTimePicker | OffsetValue | `DateTimeOffset?` | `` | Optional DateTimeOffset binding. When the caller binds this, it takes precedence: writes flow back through OffsetValueChanged with the offset that matches TimeZone at the picked wall-clock time (DST-aware). The plain ValueChanged still fires for back-compat. Recommended over Value when working with multi-zone scenarios. |
| DateTimePicker | OffsetValueChanged | `EventCallback<DateTimeOffset?>` | `` | Raised alongside ValueChanged with the offset-aware instant (DST-adjusted for TimeZone) whenever the picked value changes. |
| DateTimePicker | TimeZone | `TimeZoneInfo?` | `` | When non-null, all display/edit happens in this zone — the user picks a wall-clock instant in that zone, and the emitted DateTimeOffset carries the matching offset for that instant (DST-aware). When null, the picker behaves exactly as before (local time, no zone indicator). |
| DateTimePicker | ShowTimeZoneLabel | `bool` | `true` | When true (default) and TimeZone is set, renders a small "Europe/Berlin (UTC+1)"-style indicator next to the value. |
| DateTimePicker | Use24Hour | `bool` | `true` | Shows 24-hour time (00-23) instead of a 12-hour clock with an AM/PM column. Default true. |
| DateTimePicker | ShowSeconds | `bool` | `` | Adds a seconds column to the time picker. Default false (minute precision). |
| DateTimePicker | MinuteStep | `int` | `1` | Minute column increment. 1 (default) lists every minute; 5/15 etc. list only multiples of the step. |
| DateTimePicker | SecondStep | `int` | `1` | Second column increment (only relevant when ShowSeconds is true). Defaults to 1. |
| DateTimePicker | DateFormat | `string?` | `` | Date portion format. When null (default) falls back to the effective culture's ShortDatePattern. |
| DateTimePicker | Placeholder | `string?` | `` | Placeholder shown on the trigger button when no value is selected. Falls back to the localized "DateTimePicker.Placeholder" string when null. |
| DateTimePicker | Culture | `System.Globalization.CultureInfo?` | `` | Overrides CurrentCulture for date/time formatting. Leave null to honour ASP.NET request localization. |
| DateTimePicker | Disabled | `bool` | `` | Disables the trigger button, preventing the popover from opening. |
| DateTimePicker | Clearable | `bool` | `` | Shows a trailing clear (X) button on the trigger when a value is selected, letting the user reset Value to null. |
| DateTimePicker | MinDate | `DateTime?` | `` | Earliest selectable date/time. Forwarded to the embedded calendar's date gate; on the boundary day, also disables times before MinDate's time-of-day. |
| DateTimePicker | MaxDate | `DateTime?` | `` | Latest selectable date/time. Forwarded to the embedded calendar's date gate; on the boundary day, also disables times after MaxDate's time-of-day. |
| DateTimePicker | IsDateDisabled | `Func<DateTime, bool>?` | `` | Per-date predicate returning true to disable a specific date in the embedded calendar, independent of MinDate/MaxDate. |
| DateTimePicker | FirstDayOfWeek | `DayOfWeek?` | `` | Override the locale-derived first day of week shown by the embedded calendar. Forwarded to the inner Calendar; leave null to fall back to CurrentCulture. |
| DateTimePicker | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the trigger button. |
| DateTimePicker | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes splatted onto the trigger button. |

## Slots
- (none)

## Events
- `ValueChanged` (`EventCallback<DateTime?>`) — Raised when the user picks a date or time (or clears via Clearable) with the new Value.
- `OffsetValueChanged` (`EventCallback<DateTimeOffset?>`) — Raised alongside ValueChanged with the offset-aware instant (DST-adjusted for TimeZone) whenever the picked value changes.

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- `FormField` (`FormField.FormFieldContext?`)

## Services it injects
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)
- `IComponentInteropService` (Lumeo.Services)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<DateTimePicker />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-accent`, `--color-accent-foreground`, `--color-border`, `--color-destructive`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-input`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-primary`, `--color-primary-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`
